description_long: This rifle features a robust, matte olive-green body with a black fixed stock and a prominent black scope mounted on top. The barrel is long and slender, with venting holes along the handguard for heat dissipation. The rifle includes a detachable box magazine beneath the receiver and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The scope is large and cylindrical, suggesting long-range precision capability. The muzzle end appears to have a small device, possibly a flash hider or thread protector. The overall design is tactical and modern, suitable for urban or field use.
description: A modern olive-green rifle with a black fixed stock, large scope, and detachable box magazine, featuring a long vented barrel and tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, scope alignment, and narrow profile.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, olive-green body, black scope, fixed stock, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, scope eyepiece, and pistol grip alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the handguard and scope.
